signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Hits 5th Career 30-5-5 Game vs. Lakers, Surpassing Luka Dončić for 2nd-Most by Teenager | NO | LOW confidence**

Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg** recorded his fifth career 30-5-5 game (30+ points, 5+ rebounds, 5+ assists) during Sunday's matchup against the Los Angeles Lakers, passing Luka Dončić (now with Lakers) for the second-most such games by a teenager behind only LeBron
